Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Dec-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Albert Garcia, Esq. (510.848.5190; ajgmedlaw@yahoo.com) for and with Petitioner, Benjamin Wilbur.
Wendy Widlus, Esq. (213.269.6457; Wendy.Widlus@doj.ca.gov) Deputy Attorney General for Respondent.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER BENJAMIN WILBUR'S Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
